title: Diplazium centripetale
taxonomy: Diplazium centripetale is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically, it is classified as a vascular plant within the division Pteridophyta. The genus Diplazium is a member of the fern family, with species found in tropical and subtropical regions. The species Diplazium centripetale is native to certain parts of Asia and is known for its unique characteristics. As a part of the Pteridophyta division, Diplazium centripetale is an ancient plant lineage that has been on Earth for millions of years.
